hero.title: Who
hero.subtitle: We build technology for every level of the game. From youth teams managing their seasons to professional leagues engaging millions of fans—we're creating the complete sports technology ecosystem.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.intro: We believe great sports technology should serve every level of the game — from the youth coach juggling practice schedules to the professional team engaging millions of fans on game night.
mission.twoProducts: That's why we're building two products:

teamops.name: TeamOps
teamops.description: Operations platform for youth and amateur teams. Scheduling, communication, compliance, player safety, and much more all in one place.

proinvest.name: ProInvest Ecosystem
proinvest.description: Complete fan engagement infrastructure for professional leagues. Full-stack team apps, in-app entertainment, Seventh Skater Club for lifetime loyalty, and ProInsight for analytics.

goals: Empower youth teams with tools that simplify operations and prioritize safety
Give professional teams new ways to engage and monetize their fanbase
Build technology that scales from a single team to an entire league
Create lifelong connections between people and the game
mission.conclusion: From first skate to sold-out arenas — we're building the technology that powers the full sports journey.

philippe.name: Philippe Trop
philippe.title: CEO & Founder
philippe.description: Hockey passion + entrepreneurial drive. Founded 360° Hockey Enterprises, developing hockey training solutions. Combines deep hockey knowledge with business strategy to drive fan engagement solutions.

blake.name: Blake Nielsen
blake.title: CBDO & Co-Founder
blake.description: Combines a deep hockey passion with entrepreneurial drive. Sponsorship and partnership specialist skilled at bridging fans, brands, and leagues.

salvatore.name: Salvatore Papia
salvatore.title: CTO & Co-Founder
salvatore.description: Computer engineer and real-time systems architect. Leads the Hyperion sub-second scoring engine and AI/ML integrations. Ensures platform scalability and data security.

martin.name: Martin Villeneuve
martin.title: CFO
martin.description: Former COO at BMO Trust, responsible for managing CAD $65B in assets. Provides large-scale financial expertise, investor relations, and strategic growth focus. Ensures a sustainable runway with rigorous financial oversight.
